description: Extract coefficients a, b, and c from the quadratic equation prompt using pattern matching

inputs.name: equation_text
inputs.description: The text containing quadratic equation with coefficients to extract (e.g., 'Solve a quadratic equation where a=2, b=6, and c=5')

output.description: Returns the extracted quadratic equation coefficients as a dictionary containing integer values for the standard form ax² + bx + c = 0

workflow_spec.name: Parse Quadratic Equation and Generate Function Call
workflow_spec.description: Parses a quadratic equation query to extract coefficients and generates the appropriate function call with parameters
